name: Samsung Bespoke 4-Door French Door Refrigerator (29 cu. ft.)
description: The Samsung Bespoke 4-Door French Door Refrigerator offers 29 cu. ft. of storage with a customizable panel design to match your kitchen. It features a Beverage Center with a built-in water dispenser and AutoFill Water Pitcher. Dual Ice Maker with cubed and Ice Bites keeps your drinks perfectly chilled.
features: Beverage Center with built-in water dispenser and AutoFill Water Pitcher
Dual Ice Maker produces cubed ice and Ice Bites
Customizable Bespoke panels available in multiple colors and finishes
FlexZone drawer with 4 temperature settings
Wi-Fi enabled with SmartThings app integration

name: LG InstaView Counter-Depth MAX French Door Refrigerator (26 cu. ft.)
description: The LG InstaView Counter-Depth MAX refrigerator features a sleek built-in look with InstaView Door-in-Door technology. Knock twice to illuminate the glass panel and see inside without opening the door. The linear cooling system keeps food fresher longer with less temperature fluctuation.
features: InstaView Door-in-Door with tinted glass panel
Counter-Depth MAX design fits flush with cabinetry
Craft Ice maker produces slow-melting round ice
ThinQ app with smart diagnostics and remote control
Dual Ice Plus system for faster ice production

name: Whirlpool 25 cu. ft. Side-by-Side Refrigerator with Ice Maker
description: This Whirlpool side-by-side refrigerator delivers 25 cu. ft. of storage with adjustable gallon door bins for flexible organization. The external ice and water dispenser with EveryDrop filtration provides fresh, filtered water. Adaptive defrost technology saves energy by only running when needed.
features: External ice and water dispenser with EveryDrop filtration
Adjustable gallon door bins for flexible storage
Adaptive defrost saves energy by running only when needed
LED interior lighting illuminates every shelf
Electronic temperature controls for precise cooling

name: GE Profile French Door Refrigerator with Keurig K-Cup Brewing System (27.7 cu. ft.)
description: The GE Profile French Door refrigerator features an integrated Keurig K-Cup brewing system built right into the door, delivering hot coffee on demand. With 27.7 cu. ft. of capacity, it provides generous space alongside hands-free autofill for pitchers and glasses. Advanced water filtration ensures every sip is crisp and clean.
features: Built-in Keurig K-Cup brewing system in the door dispenser
Hands-free autofill dispenses precise amounts of filtered water
TwinChill evaporators maintain separate climates for fridge and freezer
Full-width deli drawer with adjustable temperature
Wi-Fi connected with SmartHQ app for remote monitoring

name: Samsung 5.0 cu. ft. Smart Top Load Washer with Super Speed Wash
description: The Samsung Smart Top Load Washer features 5.0 cu. ft. capacity and Super Speed technology that washes a full load in just 28 minutes. ActiveWave agitator delivers powerful cleaning with a gentle touch. Wi-Fi connectivity lets you monitor and control your laundry from your phone.
features: Super Speed Wash completes a full load in just 28 minutes
ActiveWave agitator provides thorough yet gentle cleaning
5.0 cu. ft. extra-large capacity handles big loads with ease
Smart Control via SmartThings app with cycle notifications
EZ Access tub design for easy loading and unloading

name: LG WashTower Single Unit Front Load 4.5 cu. ft. Washer and 7.4 cu. ft. Electric Dryer
description: The LG WashTower is a space-saving single-unit design combining a 4.5 cu. ft. front load washer and a 7.4 cu. ft. electric dryer. AI-powered sensors automatically select the optimal wash motions, water temperature, and spin settings. Built-in intelligence also detects fabric types in the dryer for precision drying.
features: Space-saving single-unit stacked washer and dryer design
AI Fabric Sensor detects clothing texture and selects optimal settings
TurboWash 360 technology for a complete clean in under 30 minutes
Allergiene wash cycle removes up to 95% of pet dander and dust mites
Center Control panel is ergonomically placed between the units

name: Whirlpool 4.3 cu. ft. Top Load Washer with Built-In Faucet and Impeller
description: This Whirlpool top load washer features a built-in water faucet for convenient pretreatment of stains right in the machine. The smooth impeller design provides thorough cleaning while being gentle on fabrics. Quick Wash cycle cleans lightly soiled loads in as little as 28 minutes.
features: Built-in water faucet for easy stain pretreatment
Smooth impeller provides thorough yet gentle cleaning action
Quick Wash cycle finishes lightly soiled loads in 28 minutes
Automatic water level sensor adjusts water usage to load size
Stainless steel wash basket resists odors and chipping

name: GE 7.8 cu. ft. Smart Front Load Electric Dryer with Steam and Sanitize Cycle
description: The GE Smart Front Load Electric Dryer delivers 7.8 cu. ft. of capacity for large loads. Built-in WiFi lets you receive notifications, remotely start or stop cycles, and download specialty cycles from the SmartHQ app. The Sanitize cycle eliminates 99.8% of common household bacteria.
features: 7.8 cu. ft. capacity handles large loads and bulky items
Sanitize cycle eliminates 99.8% of common household bacteria
Steam feature refreshes clothing and reduces wrinkles
Wi-Fi enabled with SmartHQ app for remote monitoring and control
Reversible door for flexible installation options

name: Bosch 800 Series 24" Top Control Built-In Dishwasher with CrystalDry
description: The Bosch 800 Series dishwasher features CrystalDry technology that transforms moisture into heat up to 176 degrees for the ultimate dry, even on plastics. Operating at just 42 dBA, it is one of the quietest dishwashers available. The flexible 3rd rack with fold-down sides accommodates tall items and silverware.
features: CrystalDry technology delivers 60% better drying results, even on plastics
Ultra-quiet operation at just 42 dBA
Flexible 3rd rack with fold-down sides for extra loading space
PrecisionWash sprays water in targeted streams for thorough cleaning
Home Connect app allows remote monitoring and cycle customization

name: KitchenAid 24" Top Control Built-In Dishwasher with FreeFlex Third Rack
description: The KitchenAid FreeFlex dishwasher features an innovative third rack with a unique loading system that creates more space below. The Clean Water Wash system uses a filtration system that continually removes food particles from the wash water for a consistently clean wash. PrintShield finish resists fingerprints and smudges.
features: FreeFlex Third Rack with innovative flip-to-fit design
Clean Water Wash system with advanced filtration for a pristine wash
44 dBA ultra-quiet performance for open-concept living
ProWash cycle senses soil level and adjusts for optimal cleaning
PrintShield stainless steel finish resists fingerprints and smudges

name: Samsung Smart Linear Wash 39 dBA Dishwasher with 3rd Rack
description: The Samsung Linear Wash dishwasher features a whisper-quiet 39 dBA operation and a linear wash system that moves the spray arm back and forth in a linear motion for exceptional coverage. AutoRelease Door automatically opens the door at the end of the cycle to circulate air and improve drying performance.
features: Linear Wash system ensures thorough spray coverage of every dish
Ultra-quiet 39 dBA operation for open floor plan kitchens
AutoRelease Door pops open at end of cycle for improved drying
Height-adjustable 3rd rack accommodates large utensils
Wi-Fi enabled with SmartThings app integration

name: Frigidaire Gallery 24" Built-In Dishwasher with OrbitClean Spray Arm
description: The Frigidaire Gallery dishwasher features the OrbitClean spray arm with 4x the water coverage of standard spray arms. The EvenDry heated drying system provides consistently dry dishes, and the 30-minute Quick Clean cycle makes short work of lightly soiled loads. DishSense technology automatically adjusts cycle time and water usage.
features: OrbitClean wash system delivers 4x better water coverage
EvenDry heated drying system for consistently dry results
30-minute Quick Clean cycle for lightly soiled dishes
DishSense technology auto-adjusts cycle time and water usage
MaxBoost dry option adds extra drying power when needed

name: Samsung 6.0 cu. ft. Smart Slide-In Gas Range with Air Fry and Convection
description: The Samsung Smart Slide-In Gas Range features Air Fry and convection cooking built into the oven, so you can enjoy crispy fried favorites without a separate appliance. The 6.0 cu. ft. oven cavity provides ample space for large meals. A Wi-Fi connected touch screen lets you control the oven remotely and download new cooking modes.
features: Built-in Air Fry technology for healthier crispy cooking
6.0 cu. ft. large oven capacity for holiday-size meals
Slide-in design for a seamless built-in look
Wi-Fi connected with LCD display for guided cooking
Flex Duo smart divider converts one oven into two separate zones

name: KitchenAid 30" Smart Oven+ Combination Wall Oven with Powered Attachments
description: The KitchenAid Smart Oven+ is a versatile combination wall oven that comes with powered attachments including a grill, baking stone, steamer, and more. The upper oven features Even-Heat True Convection for consistent baking results. The lower microwave features Crispwave technology for microwave cooking with oven-quality results.
features: Powered attachments include grille, baking stone, and steamer
Even-Heat True Convection for consistent baking on every rack
Lower microwave with Crispwave technology for oven-quality results
Smart connectivity with voice control via Alexa and Google Assistant
Temperature probe monitors internal food temp without opening the door

name: GE 30" Free-Standing Electric Convection Range with No-Preheat Air Fry
description: The GE Free-Standing Electric Range features No-Preheat Air Fry for quick and crispy results right in your oven. The edge-to-edge cooktop provides a 5th heating zone for extra flexibility, and the 5.3 cu. ft. convection oven bakes evenly on every rack. Fit Guarantee ensures a seamless replacement for standard 30-inch cutouts.
features: No-Preheat Air Fry delivers crispy results without preheating
Edge-to-edge cooktop with 5 radiant heating elements
5.3 cu. ft. oven with True European Convection
Fit Guarantee ensures it fits your existing 30-inch cutout
Self-clean with optional Steam Clean for light cleaning

name: Bosch 800 Series 30" Industrial-Style Gas Range with 5 Burners
description: The Bosch 800 Series industrial-style gas range combines professional performance with elegant design. Five sealed burners including a 20,000 BTU power burner deliver precise heat control for any cooking technique. The 3.7 cu. ft. convection oven features European convection for even results on multiple racks simultaneously.
features: 20,000 BTU power burner for rapid boiling and high-heat searing
European convection for even baking on multiple racks
Industrial-style design with heavy-duty metal knobs
Continuous cast iron grates allow easy sliding of cookware
Self-clean oven with variable clean times

name: Samsung 2.1 cu. ft. Over-the-Range Microwave with Sensor Cook
description: The Samsung Over-the-Range Microwave provides 2.1 cu. ft. of spacious interior with 1000 watts of cooking power. Sensor Cook technology detects humidity and automatically adjusts cooking time and power for optimal results. The built-in exhaust system with 400 CFM ventilation keeps your kitchen air clean while cooking.
features: 2.1 cu. ft. spacious interior fits large dishes and plates
Sensor Cook automatically adjusts time and power for perfect results
400 CFM ventilation system with charcoal filtration
Ceramic enamel interior is scratch resistant and easy to clean
Eco Mode reduces standby energy consumption

name: LG NeoChef 2.0 cu. ft. Countertop Microwave with Smart Inverter and EasyClean
description: The LG NeoChef countertop microwave features Smart Inverter technology that delivers precise, even cooking by adjusting power levels in a continuous stream rather than cycling on and off. The 2.0 cu. ft. capacity accommodates large dishes, and the hexagonal stabilizer ring ensures smooth turntable rotation. EasyClean antibacterial coating makes wiping down the interior effortless.
features: Smart Inverter technology provides precise and even cooking power
2.0 cu. ft. large capacity fits family-size dishes
EasyClean antibacterial interior coating resists stains
SmoothTouch glass touch controls for a sleek modern look
Sensor Cook with 15 auto-cook presets

name: Whirlpool 1.9 cu. ft. Over-the-Range Microwave with Steam Cooking
description: The Whirlpool Over-the-Range Microwave offers 1.9 cu. ft. of capacity with steam cooking capability for healthier meal preparation. The Scan-to-Cook feature lets you scan frozen food barcodes to automatically set the correct cooking time and power level. CleanRelease non-stick interior makes cleanup simple with just a quick wipe.
features: Steam cooking function for healthier meals that retain moisture
Scan-to-Cook technology scans barcodes for automatic settings
CleanRelease non-stick interior wipes clean in seconds
300 CFM exhaust system with multiple speed options
Cooking rack provides two-level cooking for maximum flexibility

name: GE Profile 2.2 cu. ft. Built-In Sensor Microwave Oven
description: The GE Profile Built-In Sensor Microwave offers 2.2 cu. ft. of capacity in a sleek built-in design that integrates seamlessly into cabinetry. Sensor cooking controls automatically adjust time and power for optimal results. The weight and time defrost feature takes the guesswork out of thawing frozen foods evenly.
features: Built-in design integrates flush with surrounding cabinetry
2.2 cu. ft. extra-large capacity for family-size meals
Sensor cooking controls automatically adjust cooking parameters
Weight and time defrost for precise and even thawing
Chef Connect syncs hood and microwave with the cooktop below
